mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_reminder(order_id, user_id, target_type, target_id, content, status) VALUES(#{orderId}, #{userId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{content}, 'UNREAD')
mapper.select: SELECT reminder_id AS reminderId, order_id AS orderId, user_id AS userId, target_type AS targetType, target_id AS targetId, content, status, create_time AS createTime, read_time AS readTime, handled_time AS handledTime FROM order_reminder WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY create_time DESC, reminder_id DESC
